title: Require username and password authentication to delete responses

requirements.text: When a user attempts to delete a student response in ResponseViewer, display an authentication modal (AuthModal) that requires both a username and password before the deletion is executed. The delete action must only proceed if valid credentials are provided.

quotes: to delete reponses, useraname and password is needed. it still not have password and username to delete response

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the delete button on any response in ResponseViewer opens the AuthModal dialog.
The AuthModal prompts for both a username and a password field.
If the credentials are invalid, an error message is shown and the deletion is not performed.
If the credentials are valid, the response is deleted and the list updates accordingly.
It is not possible to delete a response without successfully passing the username/password authentication step.

constraints: Use the existing AuthModal component for credential collection — do not create a new authentication dialog.
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding authentication to any other action besides deleting responses.
Changing the backend authentication or credential validation logic.
Modifying the student test-taking or submission flow.
